stars.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
stars.highlights: A terminal-native AI coding assistant that integrates directly into developer workflows. Supports multiple LLM backends and provides context-aware code generation.
stars.worthReading: Essential for developers exploring AI-assisted coding in terminal environments.

stars.description: An agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal
stars.highlights: Claude Code brings agentic AI coding capabilities directly to your terminal with deep codebase understanding and multi-file editing support.
stars.worthReading: Worth exploring for its innovative approach to AI-assisted development workflows.
